nasb.text: They killed Hamor and his son Shechem with the edge of the sword, and took Dinah from Shechem’s house, and went forth.

esv.text: They killed Hamor and his son Shechem with the sword and took Dinah out of Shechem’s house and went away.

cnv.text: 又用刀劍殺了哈抹和他兒子示劍，然後從示劍的家裡把底拿帶走。

ccb.text: 包括哈抹和示剑，从示剑家里带走了底娜。

csbs.text: 又用刀剑杀了哈抹和他的儿子示剑，然后把狄娜从示剑家里带走了。
